text: The sterile glass and metal of the meeting room evoke anticipation—a sense of pause before the unfolding of ideas. Stepping into the vivid R+D space, the air is charged with curiosity and creativity. Surrounded by voices of research and development, I feel invited to question, to engage, and to imagine futures interwoven with technology. There is both energy and slight uncertainty here, a philosophical sense of standing at the edge of discovery.
